summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of Zitex Shipping System iteration 17 — all 13 tests passed. Verified NEW features: (1) GET /api/websites/shipping/providers returns 6 SA providers (smsa, aramex, saudi_post, naqel, ajex, dhl), (2) POST /api/websites/public/{slug}/shipping/quote returns ranked options with city/country, (3) Same-city local_delivery marked as recommended, (4) Free shipping kicks in above 200 SAR threshold, (5) International shipping (US) returns only INTL providers (aramex), (6) Order creation with shipping fields re-quotes server-side to prevent fee tampering, (7) Order saved with shipping metadata (shipping_provider, shipping_provider_name, shipping_eta, shipping_city, shipping_country), (8) Dashboard shipping config GET/PUT works for owner, (9) Legacy delivery flow (no shipping_provider) still works using haversine fallback.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed orders during testing (test orders created in cozy-cafe-demo)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 shipping system fully tested. Key features verified: (1) 6 shipping providers available: smsa, aramex, saudi_post, naqel, ajex, dhl. (2) Public shipping quote endpoint POST /api/websites/public/{slug}/shipping/quote works with city/country/cart_subtotal/weight_kg params. (3) Same-city detection works - when customer city matches store_city (جدة), local_delivery is recommended with 2-4 hour ETA. (4) Free shipping threshold at 200 SAR - above this, domestic shipping is free. (5) International shipping (country=US) only returns INTL-capable providers (aramex, ajex, dhl). (6) Order creation with shipping_provider re-quotes server-side - client-sent fee is ignored and recalculated. (7) Shipping metadata saved on order: shipping_provider, shipping_provider_name, shipping_eta, shipping_city, shipping_country. (8) Dashboard config at /api/websites/projects/{id}/shipping/config supports GET/PUT for owner. (9) Legacy orders without shipping_provider use haversine-based delivery_fee calculation.

test_classes: TestShippingProviders (1 test) - PASSED: 6 providers returned with correct structure
TestPublicShippingQuote (4 tests) - PASSED: Riyadh quote, same-city local_delivery, free shipping threshold, international US
TestOrderCreationWithShipping (2 tests) - PASSED: Server-side re-quote, shipping metadata saved
TestDashboardShippingConfig (2 tests) - PASSED: GET and PUT config work for owner
TestLegacyDeliveryFlow (1 test) - PASSED: Orders without shipping_provider use haversine
TestShippingQuoteEdgeCases (3 tests) - PASSED: IP detection, heavy weight pricing, invalid slug 404
